description_long: This is a large, armored police SUV with a robust, angular body painted in a metallic gray color. The vehicle features four doors, tinted windows, and prominent wheel arches with large, black-and-silver alloy wheels. Emergency lights in red and blue are mounted on the roof, front grille, and rear, indicating its law enforcement purpose. The front grille is vented, and the vehicle has side steps for easier entry. The rear of the vehicle is boxy, with a reinforced tailgate and additional emergency lights, but no visible police markings or insignia.
description: A metallic gray, armored police SUV with red and blue emergency lights, large wheels, and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vented grille, windshield with red and blue lights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, tinted windows, side step, and large wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced tailgate, rear emergency lights, and boxy structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing doors, windows, side step, and wheels.
attribute_emergency_lights: Red and blue emergency lights are present on the roof, front grille, and rear of the vehicle. The lights are rectangular and distributed at the corners and center of the roof, as well as integrated into the front and rear sections.
